Thanks for contributing to Agent Wallet! Please fill in the sections
below. Delete any that don't apply.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup
- [ ] Security fix (please coordinate via `SECURITY.md` first if non-public)

## Related issues

<!-- Closes #123, refs #456 -->

## How was this tested?

<!--
- Which test suites were run? (e.g. `pytest tests/unit/`, `cargo test`)
- New tests added? Where?
- Manual verification steps if applicable.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally.
- [ ] New code paths have unit tests.
- [ ] Public-facing changes are reflected in `CHANGELOG.md` and (where relevant) `docs/`.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal data are committed.
- [ ] If touching the Rust gateway, `cargo fmt` and `cargo clippy` are clean.

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything specific you want reviewers to look at, design decisions,
     deferred work, etc. -->
